response.justification: The candidate is a capable, broad-spectrum software engineer with roughly 20 years of experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with recognized expertise in AI platform building and strategic advisory capacity. Current AI involvement (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) is recent and shallow relative to the seniority required, with no evidence of having shipped a recognized AI-powered product or platform at scale, no cloud architecture leadership, and no demonstrated track record of advising executive or strategic customers. Community contributions and teaching history are positives, but they do not bridge the gap to the depth of AI strategy and influence the role requires.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum with genuine breadth
Founder of GISCollective and participation in startup-stage companies demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative aligned with the preferred profile
Active knowledge-sharing through public workshops, conference talks, and open source projects aligns with the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: AI expertise is recent and surface-level (current role only); no demonstrated AI/ML platform built at scale or recognized AI thought leadership
No evidence of strategic advisory experience — advising enterprise customers or shaping product direction at director or principal scope is entirely absent
Cloud depth is minimal; AWS CDK appears in one bullet; no cloud architecture ownership, platform design, or infrastructure strategy at scale is demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience and tenure
Absence of strategic advisory or director-level scope
